calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Continued To Feb-07-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-10-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Timothy Larsen, Esq. for Plaintiff: Cherry Price
No appearance by the Defendant(s): Alex Castillo.
Plaintiff and witnesses Ruben Dones, Jr., Timothy Dews, were sworn and direct examined.
Exh. 1 - Three day Notice----------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Rental agreement----------ID/EVID.
Exh. 3 - Three day notice to cure or quit----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Alex Castillo as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1530 Shafter Ave., San Francisco.
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Per Diem Damages of $74.19/day from 11/16/04 to present.
Attorney's Fees in the amount of $2,500.00.
Costs $326.56
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Plaintiff's counsel to prepare Judgment.

Feb. 10, 2005
Judgment for the total of $8,910.14, signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Off Calendar
